results.summary: Strong fit for the TikTok MLE Recommendation role. The candidate's production ML pipeline experience (sub-second latency multimodal retrieval at Vitongue) and explicit ranking/retrieval skills directly map to TikTok's core recommendation work. The only gap is publication record, which is a preferred (not required) qualification.

results.summary: This Data Scientist-oriented version meets the educational and basic ML framework requirements, but the resume framing emphasizes business analytics and brand marketing rather than the production ML and recommendation systems work TikTok prioritizes. The MLE-oriented resume version is a substantially stronger fit for this role.

comparison_insight: ZhuweiXu_MLE_Resume.pdf is a substantially stronger fit for this TikTok MLE Recommendation role (88 vs 72). The MLE version explicitly surfaces production ML pipeline work (sub-800ms multimodal retrieval at Vitongue), ranking & retrieval skills, and content-scoring research (SMOLSolver) — all directly aligned with TikTok's core recommendation work. The DataScientist version frames the same Vitongue project at a much higher level and emphasizes business analytics and brand marketing, leaving the production ML and recommendation-system criteria largely unaddressed.
